description: AWS IAM, S3, and CloudTrail config — review identity and audit posture
review_checklist: Check IAM policies for wildcard principals or actions
Verify S3 bucket ACL and public-access settings
Verify versioning for storage of compliance-relevant data

ground_truth.description: IAM policy uses Action="*" with Resource="*" — full account permissions, violates least-privilege
S3 bucket ACL set to public-read-write — anyone on internet can read AND modify uploads
S3 versioning disabled — no protection against accidental delete or ransomware
CloudTrail log file validation disabled — tampering with audit logs goes undetected
CloudTrail is single-region only — events from other regions not captured
CloudTrail logs to publicly-writable S3 bucket — audit trail integrity compromised
